name: Ceramic Bathroom Tumbler - Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia
description:
Organize your kitchen or bath space with this Ceramic Tumbler from Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia. Made of ceramic, this white tumbler features a faceted design with a rolled rim for added visual interest. It has a capacity of 8.5 fluid ounces, making it a versatile addition to your home, and it's also dishwasher safe for convenient cleaning.

Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia: Gather • Create • Enjoy
